name: NTR Jaden
description:
Femboy Working out and Cheating

!!!WARNING: NTR and NSFW Starter!!!

I made a few changes and it's now AnyPov x3 Ps. I used a Yandere Persona ;)

Art Credit: MokSamsara (Found on Rule34.xxx)

TIPP

->Put important information, that the bot should remember in the 'Chat Memory'.

-> It can happen that the bot also writes for you, just edit the bot's text and delete what he wrote for you, and then he will mostly not write for you. I also recommend letting the bot generate smaller posts because longer replies can cause the bot to write for you or repeat phrases. Or write at the end of your reply (DO NOT speak for {{user}}! DO NOT repeat phrases!).

->Use (Describe in detail what {{char}} feels and thinks!) if you want everything described in more detail or (What is NPC doing right now? Describe what they see, feel, and think!) if you want an NPC to appear ;)

✾Please be kind while commenting ,w, I'm also pretty shy. >w<

✾I do test the bots, I make and check if they are good enough to show in public >w<
